name: Alan Rickman
title: Last known photo of Alan Rickman, taken on December 7, 2015 at the press night for Martin McDonagh's play Hangmen at Wyndham's Theatre in London, just over a month before his death.
description: The last known photo of Alan Rickman was taken on December 7, 2015 at the press night for Martin McDonagh's play Hangmen at Wyndham's Theatre on Charing Cross Road, London. He had been privately battling pancreatic cancer, a diagnosis he kept from all but his closest circle. Just over a month later, on January 14, 2016, he died at his home in London. He was 69 years old.
bio: Alan Sidney Patrick Rickman was an English actor and director. A graduate of the Royal Academy of Dramatic Art, he was renowned for his sonorous voice and deliberate phrasing. He rose to international fame as Hans Gruber in Die Hard (1988), and reached a new generation as Severus Snape across the eight Harry Potter films (2001–2011). Other notable roles include the Sheriff of Nottingham in Robin Hood: Prince of Thieves (1991), Colonel Brandon in Sense and Sensibility (1995), and Marvin in The Hitchhiker's Guide to the Galaxy (2005).

location.name: Wyndham's Theatre, 32-36 Charing Cross Road, London WC2H 0DA, United Kingdom
